meaning: adj.无铅的 不含四乙(基)铅的
examples: The invention relates the rare earth modified leadless X ray barrier plastic.
High density packaging can he achieved by using leadless ceramic chip carriers (LCCCs).
The leadless packaging structure reduces the packaging size of the semiconductor device and reduces the product cost.
Meanwhile Heinrich Wieneke, an assistant professor of cardiology at the West German Heart Centre in Essen, is working on another leadless approach.
It is similar to Dr Echt's leadless pacemaker, but it uses electromagnetic induction, rather than ultrasound, to stimulate a small implanted receiver, which in turn stimulates the heart.
